name: Corridor of Agony
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>苦</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>く</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>痛</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>つう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>回</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>廊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ろう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Monsters that were Special Summoned from the Main Deck cannot activate their effects, their effects are negated, and they cannot declare an attack, as long as they remain face-up on the field.
eff: Monsters that were Special Summoned from the Main Deck cannot activate their effects, their effects are negated, and they cannot declare an attack, as long as they remain face-up on the field.

mst: Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
attack: Prevents your opponent's monsters from attacking
